TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-map_imuy
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: mzukat tibuya matiw tmalawma tu naung.
S.PHON: mz~rukat tiβuja matiw tmarawma tu nauŋ.
S.FORM: mzukat tibuya matiw tmalawma tu naung.
S.PHON: mz~rukat tiβuja matiw tmarawma tu nauŋ.
S.TRANSL: Buya went out and went across the mountain.

S.FORM: utulu naungan nitalawmaan ni buya tu naung nani.
S.PHON: uturu nauŋan nitarawmaan ni βuja tu nauŋ nani.
S.FORM: utulu naungan nitalawmaan ni buya tu naung nani.
S.PHON: uturu nauŋan nitarawmaan ni βuja tu nauŋ nani.

S.FORM: tmayta tu usiq babuy na naung.
S.PHON: tmajta tu usiq βaβuj na nauŋ.
S.FORM: tmayta tu usiq babuy na naung.
S.PHON: tmajta tu usiq βaβuj na nauŋ.

S.FORM: sumnizti pasazi ta lepawanna ni utay.
S.PHON: sumniz~rti pasaz~ri ta rəpawanna ni utaj.
S.FORM: sumnizti pasazi ta lepawanna ni utay.
S.PHON: sumniz~rti pasaz~ri ta rəpawanna ni utaj.

TRANSL.notes: (He) came down and went towards Utay's house.

S.TRANSL: came down and went towards Utay's house.

S.FORM: nani matiw pasazi talepawan ni utay.
S.PHON: nani matiw pasaz~ri tarəpawan ni utaj.
S.FORM: nani matiw pasazi talepawan ni utay.
S.PHON: nani matiw pasaz~ri tarəpawan ni utaj.

S.FORM: tu sumnis nani pasazi ta kawilian.
S.PHON: tu sumnis nani pasaz~ri ta kawirian.
S.FORM: tu sumnis nani pasazi ta kawilian.
S.PHON: tu sumnis nani pasaz~ri ta kawirian.

TRANSL.notes: (He) came down and then went towards the left.

S.TRANSL: came down and then went towards the left.

S.FORM: tu tmayta tu 'nay usiq yau a iki 'nay ta kinilan na lazan.
S.PHON: tu tmajta tu ʔnaj usiq jau a iki ʔnaj ta kiniran na raz~ran.
S.FORM: tu tmayta tu 'nay usiq yau a iki 'nay ta kinilan na lazan.
S.PHON: tu tmajta tu ʔnaj usiq jau a iki ʔnaj ta kiniran na raz~ran.
S.TRANSL: 看到有一個池塘在路的旁邊.

TRANSL.notes: (He) saw that there was a pond by the road.

S.TRANSL: saw that there was a pond by the road.

S.FORM: nani wiyati smaqay tmalawma tu iRuR.
S.PHON: nani wijati smaqaj tmarawma tu iʁuʁ.
S.FORM: nani wiyati smaqay tmalawma tu iRuR.
S.PHON: nani wijati smaqaj tmarawma tu iʁuʁ.

TRANSL.notes: (He) continued walking and crossed the river.

S.TRANSL: continued walking and crossed the river.

S.FORM: nani wiyati smaqay tmuqaz nani.
S.PHON: nani wijati smaqaj tmuqaz~r nani.
S.FORM: nani wiyati smaqay tmuqaz nani.
S.PHON: nani wijati smaqaj tmuqaz~r nani.

S.FORM: tmayta tu usiq yau a zena ta nilaziwanna.
S.PHON: tmajta tu usiq jau a z~rəna ta niraz~riwanna.
S.FORM: tmayta tu usiq yau a zena ta nilaziwanna.
S.PHON: tmajta tu usiq jau a z~rəna ta niraz~riwanna.
S.TRANSL: 看到有一片水田在他經過的地方.

TRANSL.notes: And (he) saw that there was a paddy field in the place he passed by.

S.TRANSL: And saw that there was a paddy field in the place he passed by.

S.FORM: tu wiyati tmanan tema wiyati smaqay nani.
S.PHON: tu wijati tmanan təma wijati smaqaj nani.
S.FORM: tu wiyati tmanan tema wiyati smaqay nani.
S.PHON: tu wijati tmanan təma wijati smaqaj nani.

S.FORM: tmalawma m pasazi tmalawmati tu 'nay paRin a yau.
S.PHON: tmarawma m pasaz~ri tmarawmati tu ʔnaj paʁin a jau.
S.FORM: tmalawma m pasazi tmalawmati tu 'nay paRin a yau.
S.PHON: tmarawma m pasaz~ri tmarawmati tu ʔnaj paʁin a jau.

TRANSL.notes: (He) passed by the tree over there.

S.TRANSL: passed by the tree over there.

S.FORM: awka maseq tu lepawna ya ti buya.
S.PHON: awka masəq tu rəpawna ja ti βuja.
S.FORM: awka maseq tu lepawna ya ti buya.
S.PHON: awka masəq tu rəpawna ja ti βuja.
S.TRANSL: Then Buya arrived at his house.
